description: Prepare for a Messier Marathon at Kitt Peak National Observatory (31.958° N, 111.596° W, 2096m). Configure the display for twilight horizon planning by enabling Deep-Sky Object markers, the azimuthal coordinate grid, and the atmosphere, while disabling the ground. Document the evening observation of galaxy M74 on March 22, 2026, at 02:30 UTC with a screenshot centered on the target. Document the morning observation of globular cluster M30 on March 22, 2026, at 12:00 UTC with a screenshot centered on the target. Write an observing plan mentioning 'Kitt Peak', 'M74', and 'M30' to /home/ga/Desktop/marathon_plan.txt.
